headline: Three event formats, tailored to your occasion.
description: We adapt content for beginners and experienced makers alike.

items.title: Team Building Session
items.description: A collaborative throwing and hand-building session focused on play and shared outcomes.

items.title: Celebration Atelier
items.description: An elevated birthday or anniversary format with curated table styling and keepsake pieces.

items.title: Brand Gathering
items.description: A story-driven session for launches and communities, with optional gifting add-ons.
